issues.value: This pilot study (April 2003–August 2005) enrolled 155 adult patients with various solid tumors (predominantly renal cell carcinoma) to evaluate ⁹⁹ᵐTc-EC20, an FR-targeted imaging agent. Of 154 evaluable patients, 68% had EC20-positive tumors (mild/marked uptake), with 61% agreement with IHC (FRα detection, κ=0.096) and better positive result alignment (72%). The agent was well tolerated (8% adverse events, 3 possibly related), supporting its safety as a noninvasive tool for identifying patients potentially eligible for FR-targeted therapy.
issues.details: max=255, actual=546
